description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat green roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, large glass windows, and wooden accent panels that add warmth to the facade. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a rooftop garden area. A swimming pool is visible in the backyard, surrounded by a manicured lawn and a privacy wall. The structure is elevated above street level, with a prominent staircase and a partially enclosed entryway. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat green roofs, large glass windows, wood accents, and a backyard pool. The design features clean lines, open terraces, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, staircase, and a mix of white, gray, and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical window strips, flat roof, and privacy wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive glass windows, balconies, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the flat roof, side lawn, and secondary entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide staircase, recessed door, wood panel accents, and no porch or columns
